title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced triumphs in sales as Ubisoft retracts its controversial statement on microtransactions
summary: The remake of Ubisoft's classic tops the sales charts in the UK while the company removes from its annual report the claim that microtransactions make games 'more fun'.

title: Bethesda employees protest against Microsoft after drastic cuts in The Elder Scrolls Online
summary: ZeniMax workers state they 'will not disappear silently' in the face of mass layoffs that have reduced The Elder Scrolls Online studio to its size from a decade ago.

title: Warframe calls the end of Destiny 2 'tragic' and an 'existential threat' from executives
summary: The Warframe studio regrets that Bungie had to shut down Destiny 2 due to an executive decision and warns that it is a risk for the entire industry.

title: Steam reaches a historic half-year revenue record with $11.1 billion in 2026
summary: Valve's platform experiences its most lucrative semester driven by high game prices and interest in older titles.

title: League of Legends Classic already has a release date with patches decided by player vote
summary: Riot Games takes inspiration from Old School RuneScape for its nostalgic mode, where players will decide the game's updates and patches.

title: Palworld sweeps with its version 1.0 and reaches its second historical peak of players on Steam
summary: Pocketpair's survival game surpasses Dota 2 in concurrent players and nearly reaches 900,000 simultaneous players after the release of its full version.

title: Christopher Nolan states that young people reject AI immediately and permanently
summary: The filmmaker celebrates the success of the movie Backrooms and assures that young people have a very strict criterion against content generated by artificial intelligence.

title: Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and 2 PlayStation ports are harshly criticized for their high price and poor improvements
summary: Digital Foundry calls the releases 'disappointing' and they barely offer technical improvements over the PS3 and Xbox 360 originals.

title: The advance of digital format on PlayStation generates consumer criticism and class action lawsuit in the Netherlands
summary: Consumers and retailers criticize Sony for prioritizing digital while a class action lawsuit questions its control over prices and access to games.

title: Actor Sam Neill, the unforgettable Dr. Alan Grant from Jurassic Park, dies at 78
summary: The New Zealand actor, famous for his roles in Jurassic Park, Event Horizon, and The Hunt for Red October, has passed away according to international press reports.

title: The Outer Worlds 2 director denies 'misinformation' about layoffs and defends Obsidian's DNA
summary: Brandon Adler clarifies that Obsidian maintains the same essence of New Vegas and KOTOR 2 amid rumors and criticism over layoffs at Xbox.

title: Octopath Traveler 1 and 2 will come to Nintendo Switch 2 with visual and performance improvements
summary: Square Enix will optimize the first two titles of the HD-2D saga for Nintendo's new console.

title: Games Done Quick cancels its sponsorship with SNK live due to human rights concerns
summary: The charity apologizes for the 'oversight' of accepting funds from a company linked to Saudi Arabia and cuts ties immediately after user complaints.

title: Magic: The Gathering faces criticism for its collaboration with The Lord of the Rings and the return of Goblin Storm
summary: Fans accuse the card game creators of 'dishonoring' Tolkien's work, while the controversial Secret Lair collection arrives on Kickstarter.

title: Super Bomberman Collection will receive a free update with Panic Bomber W in August
summary: Konami will release a free update that will add a new game mode and additional content to the collection next August.

title: God of War Laufey confirms its physical release and points to 2027
summary: Santa Monica Studio assures that the new installment of the action and Norse mythology saga will be released on disc, amid the debate over Sony's digital format.

title: EA removes microtransactions from EA Sports College Football 27 after fan protest
summary: The company reverses its decision to include monetization in the popular sports simulator after strong opposition from players.

title: Vanillaware artist isolated himself for six years in the mountains to create a cult RPG
summary: The developer isolated himself for six years to create a lush RPG that is a love letter to the classics of the genre.

title: Fan develops PC port of Silent Hill: Downpour and restores a deleted boss battle
summary: The ambitious unofficial project recovers cut content from the original 2012 game and makes it playable on modern computers.

title: Mod for Baldur's Gate 3 adds an extra final scene for Astarion that developers omitted
summary: The modder decided to complete the character's narrative arc with a cinematic that avoids an abrupt ending, being very well received by the community.
